kind.description:
Kind of the contract (`delegator_contract` or `smart_contract`),
where `delegator_contract` - manager.tz smart contract for delegation purpose only

alias.description: Name of the project behind the contract or contract description

address.description: Public key hash of the contract

delegate.description: Information about the current delegate of the contract. `null` if it's not delegated

creationLevel.description: Height of the block where the contract was created

creationTime.description: Datetime of the block where the contract was created (ISO 8601, e.g. `2020-02-20T02:40:57Z`)
